Valoper's details:
## secp-node
Authoritative-format Secp256k1 decoder vector.

- Operator Address: g1pppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppp
- Signing Address: g1tttttttttttttttttttttttttttttttttttttt
- Signing PubKey: gpub1pgfj7ard9eg82cjtv4u4xetrwqer2dntxyfzxz3pqypqxpq9qcrsszg2pvxq6rs0zqg3yyc5z5tpwxqergd3c8g7ruszzaywaz7
- Server Type: cloud
